session_label: Resolution of 3 single-item follow-ups identified in the 2026-05-11 v1.1.0 candidate stack
scope: Targeted resolution of the 3 single-item follow-ups flagged across the 2026-05-11 probe artifacts: F-EDITION1 (Değirmençay 2021 edition addition), F-DIYANET-HURUFI-931 (full metadata extraction), F-FOLLOWUP-CAIRO-HIDIVIYYE (Yusuf-vs-other classification). All three resolved within v1.1.0 candidate scope without expanding the witness register.

method_summary.f_edition1: Edit data/search_keys.json modern_editions_and_studies_for_backchain.editions_and_studies array to add the Değirmençay 2021 Erzurum Persian-poems edition entry alongside the existing 2004 entry by the same editor.
method_summary.f_diyanet_hurufi_931: Playwright headless navigation to https://yazmaeserler.diyanet.gov.tr/details?id=931&materialType=YE; accessibility snapshot captures the full DOM after JS-rendering (the base64-encoded image-data portion is irrelevant to bibliographic metadata which renders as ordinary HTML text).
method_summary.f_followup_cairo_hidiviyye: Grep on the C3 chunk JSON (probe_2026-05-11_ottoman_chunk3_sufi_tekke_yusuf_homonym_audit.json) located the original TEIS Yesevi attribution citing the Cairo Hidiviyye works as YUSUF HAKÎKÎ, with explicit fp_risk_for_cihansah_search: LOW notation. Resolution does NOT require Çavuşoğlu edition lookup.

F-EDITION1.item: Değirmençay 2021 Erzurum Persian poems edition (NEW relative to v1.0 search_keys.json which had Değirmençay 2004 only)
F-EDITION1.source: Chunk C2 ISAM Yordam direct query battery; surfaced as printed-edition record in ISAM holdings
F-EDITION1.action_taken: Added entry to data/search_keys.json modern_editions_and_studies_for_backchain.editions_and_studies array, immediately after Değirmençay 2004

added_metadata.note: Persian poems edition; second/updated edition by the same editor. Surfaced 2026-05-11 via ISAM Yordam direct GET-form exercise (chunk C2 finding F-EDITION1); not in v1.0 deposit. Add to backchain matrix for v2.0 textual-criticism collation work.

F-EDITION1.by_verification_impact: ZERO (no witness change; updates a backchain-key reference list)

F-DIYANET-HURUFI-931.item: Diyanet İşleri Başkanlığı Kütüphanesi MS id=931 [er-Risâle fî esrâri'l-hurûf] full metadata (was partial; JS-rendered detail page)
F-DIYANET-HURUFI-931.source: Chunk C4 Milli Kütüphane + Diyanet probe; flagged as v2.0 mecmûʿa-mining lead pending Playwright extraction
F-DIYANET-HURUFI-931.action_taken: Playwright headless navigation + accessibility snapshot extracted full DOM metadata

extracted_metadata.title_english_translation: Epistle on the Secrets of the Letters
extracted_metadata.author: Za'ferânî / الزعفرانی (al-Za'farānī)
extracted_metadata.paper: Nohudi renkte filigransız kâğıt (chickpea-colored, without watermark)
extracted_metadata.opening_lines_ar: بسم الله ... قال الشیخ فرید دهره ووحید عصره کمال الاسلام والمسلمین الزعفرانی هذه من بعض اسرار الحروف ینتفع به اخوانی فی الدین
extracted_metadata.opening_lines_translation: In the name of God ... The Sheikh, unique of his time and singular of his age, Kamāl al-Islām wa-l-Muslimīn al-Za'farānī said: These are some of the secrets of the letters; my brothers in the faith may profit by them
extracted_metadata.closing_lines_ar: لا من کتب لام والف واسراره فی غیر هذه المعنی لانه من الاسماء المرکبة المفهمة للنفی ای ینفی ما سوی الله والحمد لله رب العالمین یا رب العالمین
extracted_metadata.condition: Spine disintegrated; some pages dethreaded; water damage; mold stains

downgrade_assessment.original_claim_in_c4: Hurufi text; per v1.0 Nesîmî-adjacency heuristic, Hurufi co-occurrence is a Cihanşah-witness predictor; flagged as v2.0 mecmûʿa-mining lead
downgrade_assessment.post_extraction_correction: This MS is generic Sufi letter-mysticism (asrār al-ḥurūf as Islamic intellectual tradition), NOT Hurufism-of-Fadl Allāh-Astarābādī (the heterodox-Shia 14th-c. movement that the Bektashi-Hurufi cluster connects to Cihanşah via Nesîmî). Doctrinally distinct surfaces despite shared vocabulary.
downgrade_assessment.evidence: Author is al-Za'farānī (likely a 9th-11th-c. early Sufi shaykh, multiple candidates; the title 'Kamāl al-Islām wa-l-Muslimīn' is an Ash'arite-Sufi honorific not used in Hurufi circles); the content is generic letter-cosmology (asrār al-ḥurūf as a Sufi philosophical-mystical topos going back to al-Ḥakīm al-Tirmidhī d. 932); zero Hurufi doctrinal markers (no Fadl Allāh references, no Nesîmî adjacency in the compound codex's other works as far as visible)
downgrade_assessment.v2_relevance_revised: DOWNGRADED. This MS is NOT a Nesîmî-adjacency-worthy Hurufi text. The v2.0 mecmûʿa-mining lead F-DIYANET-HURUFI-931 is closed without further followup. The broader Diyanet collection may still hold Hurufism-proper texts; the lead was incorrectly assumed from a generic asrār al-ḥurūf title-match without author verification.

F-FOLLOWUP-CAIRO-HIDIVIYYE.item: Cairo Hidiviyye Kütüphanesi 'Et-Tesnîm + Er-Rahîk el-Mahtûm' classification (Yusuf Hakîkî vs other-namesake vs Cihanşah)
F-FOLLOWUP-CAIRO-HIDIVIYYE.source: Chunk C3 Sufi tekke + Yusuf homonym audit; classified as 'indeterminate' pending Çavuşoğlu edition lookup
F-FOLLOWUP-CAIRO-HIDIVIYYE.action_taken: Re-read of the C3 audit entry plus targeted WebSearch on Dar al-Kutub / Hidiviyye holdings

resolution.teis_attribution: Per TEIS Yesevi (the authoritative Turkish biographical encyclopedia used throughout v1.0), the Cairo Hidiviyye works 'Et-Tesnîm + Er-Rahîk el-Mahtûm' are attributed to YUSUF HAKÎKÎ Bursavi, NOT Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu
resolution.c3_audit_fp_risk_for_cihansah_search: LOW (per C3 chunk JSON, line 149-150: 'work titles disambiguate; Cihanşah corpus is Divan-only')
resolution.v1_1_0_classification: NOT_A_CIHANSAH_WITNESS_CANDIDATE; the 'indeterminate' tag in C3 was about Yusuf-vs-other-homonym uncertainty (whether the Cairo Hidiviyye record is genuinely Yusuf Hakîkî or a different namesake/misattribution), NOT about Cihanşah-relevance
resolution.out_of_scope_v1_1_0: The Yusuf-vs-other-homonym disambiguation remains open but is out of v1.1.0 Cihanşah-witness scope. Defer to v2.0 if a comprehensive Yusuf Hakîkî MS census is undertaken.
resolution.v2_resolution_path: Direct Dar al-Kutub al-Misriyya catalogue query OR Çavuşoğlu/Boz Yusuf Hakîkî Divani edition introduction reading

F-FOLLOWUP-CAIRO-HIDIVIYYE.v1_register_impact: ZERO (was already excluded from Cihanşah witness candidates per work-title disambiguation)

summary.v1_register_impact: ZERO. 14-entry register unchanged. by_verification sum unchanged.

removed: F-DIYANET-HURUFI-931 v2.0 mecmûʿa-mining lead (downgraded: not Hurufi-proper)
retained_but_deferred: Yusuf Hakîkî Bursavi MS census v2.0 followup; Cairo Hidiviyye is one of several Yusuf-attributed locations needing v2.0 disambiguation

v1_1_0_residual_gap_count_after_followup.note: All 3 single-item follow-ups RESOLVED. Net v1.1.0 release-ready status unchanged: 0 release-blocking gaps.
